creator: exploringlondon
caption:
This has to be the prettiest Town Hall in London, it’s stunning and so pink! 💗

This is Woolwich Town Hall, a rare example of an Edwardian Baroque building in London, and it is Grade II listed. The building was opened in 1906 and the beautiful pastel pink Victoria Hall is show-stopping.

The Town Hall is used by residents to register births, get married, and attend other meetings and events. It’s free to enter and see and we’d highly recommend it!

transcription.text: The angels up in the clouds are jealous knowing we found something so wild We'll be ordinary You're gonna be kissing the ground We'll be sanctuary Try to be what you thought
